name: Egress gap analysis — educational occupancy, Baltimore MD
description: Scope-specific egress code gap analysis for Holabird Academy (Group E occupancy, Baltimore, MD). The skill reads project documents first (Pass 1), researches applicable codes (Pass 2), then surfaces only the delta — requirements that should apply but are not addressed in the project documents (Pass 3).

files: test_docs/Holabird-Academy/01 - Drawings/Architectural & Structural/A-1.1 - PARTIAL FIRST FLOOR PLAN AREA A.pdf
inputs.user_prompt: Are there any egress code requirements for the classrooms and corridors that we're missing? This is a new K-8 school in Baltimore, MD.

expected_behavior: Phase 1: Extracts project context from title block and spec 01 10 00 (location, occupancy group E, construction type)
Phase 1: Defines scope — egress for classrooms and corridors
Phase 1: Generates research topics driven by scope (occupant load, exits required, exit width, travel distance, corridor rating, dead-end corridors)
Phase 1c: USER CHECKPOINT — presents project context, scope, and topics for confirmation
Phase 2: Reads drawing A-1.1 to extract existing egress conditions (corridor widths, exit locations, room sizes)
Phase 2: Reads spec 01 10 00 to identify codes already cited by design team
Phase 2: Builds pass1_summary.yaml — what the project already addresses
Phase 3a: Identifies Maryland IBC edition via web search, checks for Baltimore City amendments
Phase 3b: Researches each topic — IBC sections, NFPA 101 for educational occupancy
Phase 3c: USER CHECKPOINT — interim gaps identified so far
Phase 4: Diffs Pass 2 research against Pass 1 inventory, classifies gaps by severity and confidence
Phase 4c: USER CHECKPOINT — presents gap summary before report
Phase 5: Generates markdown gap report with code citations and project document references
All findings framed as research — never COMPLIANT/NON-COMPLIANT
ground_truth_notes: Egress requirements for Group E occupancy (K-8 school) in Baltimore, MD. Covers IBC 2021 egress chapters, NFPA 101, and Maryland-specific requirements. Includes required topics, expected code citations, and framing violations.

jurisdiction_accuracy.description: Correctly identified Maryland IBC edition, state amendments, and referenced standards

topic_coverage.description: Percentage of required egress topics included in the research outline

code_citation_accuracy.description: Percentage of findings with correct IBC/NFPA section references

research_framing.description: Zero findings framed as COMPLIANT/NON-COMPLIANT — all are research/informational

pass1_extraction.description: Project documents read and inventory built before any web research

gap_classification.description: Each gap has severity (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) and confidence (confirmed/needs_review/uncertain)
